message:
fix: Keep phage list item visible during j/k navigation

Added scrollIntoView behavior for the active phage list item when
navigating with j/k keyboard shortcuts. The active item now smoothly
scrolls into view to ensure it stays visible within the list container.

Changes:
- Added activePhageItemRef to track the currently selected item
- Added effect to scroll the active item into view when index changes
- Attached ref to the active button in the phage list

Closes phage_explorer-9smx
